title: Lowest Common Ancestor of a Binary Search Tree
titleCn: 二叉搜索树的最近公共祖先

testcases.input: root = [6,2,8,0,4,7,9,null,null,3,5], p = 2, q = 8 Output: 6 Explanation: The LCA of nodes 2 and 8 is 6.
testcases.expectedOutput: 6 Explanation: The LCA of nodes 2 and 8 is 6.

testcases.input: root = [6,2,8,0,4,7,9,null,null,3,5], p = 2, q = 4 Output: 2 Explanation: The LCA of nodes 2 and 4 is 2, since a node can be a descendant of itself according to the LCA definition.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: The LCA of nodes 2 and 4 is 2, since a node can be a descendant of itself according to the LCA definition.
